name: Greens Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1-1/3 cups chopped red, yellow, or green bell pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook black-eyed peas in a medium pot of boiling water until just tender, about 30 minutes. Drain.
2. Spray a large, heavy skillet with vegetable cooking spray and saute jicama, bell pepper, carrot, onion, and garlic over medium-high heat for 5 minutes.
3. Add tomato sauce, broth, oregano, cilantro, and black-eyed peas to the skillet and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Cook pasta in a large pot of boiling water until just tender, stirring occasionally. Drain well.
5. Divide greens among plates. Top each serving with 2/3 cup pasta and about 1 cup sauce.
